scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ai,agent,blueprint,runtime,coding-agent,web-ui,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,blue,white,red,green,magenta" "cd packages/llm && npm run dev" "cd packages/agent && npm run dev" "cd packages/blueprint && npm run dev" "cd packages/runtime && npm run dev" "cd packages/coding-agent && npm run dev" "cd packages/web-ui && npm run dev" "cd packages/tui && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:tsc: concurrently --names "ai,web-ui" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd packages/llm && npm run dev:tsc" "cd packages/web-ui && npm run dev:tsc"
scripts.check: npm run check:fast && npm run check:test && npm run check:blueprints && npm run check:browser-smoke && cd packages/web-ui && npm run check
scripts.check:fast: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsc --noEmit && node scripts/check-boot.mjs && npm run check:lint && npm run check:adapters
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check && npm test
scripts.publish: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
scripts.check:lint: eslint --cache --cache-strategy content packages/core/*/src/ packages/tools/*/src/ packages/profiles/*/src/ packages/ui/tui/src/ packages/cli/src/ --max-warnings 0
